review_text: Beautiful location. Friendly owners, well maintained and clean amenities. Nice a quiet. Lovely place to stay.

Loved our stay!
Friendly, helpful staff, great site, clean amenities.

Such a lovely park! Super Friendly and will tell you about every good spot they know. Great family park if you have kids.  Everything is within walking distance also.
Will definitely be back in the future.
Nice holiday spot

Got an extra star as the Receptionist is lovely. Careful up the top with the permanents, think they may be hard of hearing as have loud voices, loud TV's battling with loud radio. Park has clean amenities and nice grass. Across from a great bike path by the bay.
We only had a short stop to see the dolphins but the camp sites were large and grassy.
Friendy  warm atmosphere, cabins clean  great  relaxing with awsome views x2 have boat parking

Fantastic little caravan park clean and tidy.
Staff are awesome rebooked for next year definitely our new annual holiday spot.

Immaculate, quiet, walking distance to local ammenities and marina. Had a fantastic night out at the fish and chip shop, amazing, local band played popular and rock music and allowed public to join in. All for free. BYO music and drinks 😃 Don't know how often they do this but it was a pleasant surprise and a memorable night.

Assolutamente da consigliare. Il posto è bello ed il campeggio molto ben curato. I proprietari gentilissimi. Ci è spiaciuto molto fermarci solo una notte, ma eravamo in viaggio. Sicuramente ci sarebbe piaciuto fermarci di più.Almeno un’ altra notte, ma non è stato possibile.
Volevamo ringraziare per averci trovato un posto , e siamo pure arrivati dopo orario ufficio senza prenotare. il posto è incantevole, uno dei migliori campeggi che abbiamo trovato. Grazie ancora per la splendida accoglienza
Very local to shops, good service.

Great place will definitely stay again, prices are great, we stayed 4 nights, 3 on a site and 1 in a cabin. Manager was very accommodating with us moving into the cabin without having to pack immediately on check out as it was very hot and they were all very accommodating. Amenities were very clean and the position of the place was perfect. Close to everything and directly across from the water.
Dave and Lin

We spent 2 nights at this very low key caravan park. It does not have all the bells and whistles like jumping pillows or games rooms for the kid. What it does have is clean bathrooms, tidy well maintained grass powered sites at really reasonable price. I would definitely stay there again.

I only passed Tin Can Bay and stayed in my car, but I could do my laundry and dry it for 10 dollars, take a nice hot shower for only 3 dollars.
Very kind owners, allowed me to use their kitchen too, the people staying there were kind too.
Good vibes all around!
Great and quiet little caravan park right across the road to the water
Peaceful place with comfortable cabin on the Esplanade, great place for a relaxing time.

Great caravan park in Tin Can Bay.  Staff were friendly and helpful.  We had a cabin directly on the road which made it feel like private accommodation and not a caravan park.  In this quiet town there was minimal road noise so being on the road was not an issue.  Cabin was spacious,  bed comfortable.   Kitchen had adequate utensils to cook basic meals. Loved the induction cook plate and large electric frypan.  Easy walk to watch dolphin feeding, and a nice gentle walkway goes around the town along the foreshore.

Great little park, close to the marina and local shops.  10 minutes to Cooloola Cove Woolworths.  Great views and easy access to sites.  Only real negative was the heavy wear to the annex/ awning area of our site. Heavy rain meant a lot of water to this area that was slow to dry up
The cabin was worth the price we paid $140! Clean room, comfy bed, good kitchen setup- can’t get better than this and it’s not far from the feeding spot. Highly recommend this place.
Everything you need. Staff friendly, bed comfy and shower was hot. Walking distance to the RSL, or enjoy a walk along the foreshore.

The sites are small, everyone’s cars encroach on others sites. The slab on the site wasn’t cleaned. The amenities were not cleaned during our three nights stay. Overall it seems that the maintenance in general is not up to standard. I gave 3 stars because of the location only.
Awesome park but no wifi
So close to the Yacht club. Easy walk along the path. Toilets and showers are close by. Easy to park van on site
Excellent customer service very clean toilet and showers. Very good sites
Great caravan park. Just a short stroll to the marina and
Had amazing stay here. Thanks to the managers yge rooms are nice. Just a Lil dusty but T's lovely.

We stayed in our Caravan, first impression, the staff are amazing extremely helpful, and try to meet your needs. |The site fees where very reasonable, very good good size, level and well kept site |The ammenities block was spotless, very clean. The park is in a very good location within walking distance to cafes and shops. |Across the road a great walk along the waters edge with amazing views.|We will definitely be back
When we booked in Glen made a point to let us know local coffee shops, cafes, clubs and attractions, we had a lovely powered site and amenities were very clean, great place to stay
Top spot to overnight on our way North.
The bunk beds didn't have power point's for medical equipment. The roof in the bathroom has a growing

My family and I have been seeing Richard on and off for many years.|He is exceptional |I could barely walk through my sciatica pain when I met him, |With his help|I’m now back to living my best life.|I would highly recommend him if you’re looking for the best.||Kind regards Lizz mark and family.
Schöne Szenerie, tropisches Flair, reine Amenities und sehr gutes Preis Leistung Verhältnis. Nicht weit zur Marina und zum Dolphin Feeding! GUTE Wahl.

We camped with our van for a few days.
I was greeted by a lovely friendly gentleman who was so helpful and informative.
The Caravan Park is clean and well maintained all amenities are spotless.
It is a quiet place and in the best location close to the water.
We will definitely be back 😁
Nice and clean, good service
Lovely quiet CP, would stay again

Glen and Robin were awesome to work with. The amenities at the park were on point, reminder that families do attend. The local life was on point and the community was amazing. Highly recommend staying with family or a boys fishing trip.
Loved the cabins.

Cabin was clean, facilities easy to access and the staff were so helpful and friendly. The bed that we had was super comfy and there was ample blankets as there was some rain/wind over night which made our stay a little chilly. Staff recommended the dolphin feeding which we did and it was amazing. Really enjoyed our stay!
Great park, very quiet except for the odd "road racer" that are everywhere.  Easy access sites. Spotless amenities. Handy to all of Tin Can Bays attractions.

We really enjoyed our stay in this perfectly located park. Our powered site was quite large and well grassed. Amenities were good and staff friendly and helpful. Highly recommend the RSL for a Sunday BBQ lunch as well as the local dolphin feeding. Being dog friendly was a bonus for us. Tin Can Bay is a beautiful place.

Great little caravan park that is close to the town’s shops, the water, marina and some of the eateries. We stayed on a powered site after the school holidays, so no kids. Best to stay a few days to soak in the tranquility. Staff are very friendly and helpful. Has all the basic amenities. Photos won’t do it justice. We will be returning.

Fantastic stay!
Pleasantly surprised for the price, booked last min and were not very optimistic about what we would get for the fantastic price!
But we will definitely be staying again!
Perfect getaway for our family of 4! Glen, I presume was the owner or manager of the park and was friendly and helpful! Moved our room to  help accommodate for boat parking and a few other little touches :) Thankyou Glen!
Love love loved that linen and towels were provided! We have stayed a few places and had to bring it or forgot to and then been stung with huge rental fees. It was so nice that it was included in such a small town.
The cabin was small but well laid out, clean and had everything you needed. We slept our 4 year old twins in the room and ourselves in the bunks. Icey cold fridge, split system worked well and kitchenette equiped with everything you need, good water pressure but small system so don't let you greedy kids and husband shower for too long otherwise you will be left with not hot water (ask me how I know!). The hot plates do take a LONG time to boil water but once you know that it's ok.
Also loved we were provided with real soap to do the dishes with and enough toliet paper for our stay. These things are little, but we travel alot and often are either not provided or are so cheap and nasty you can't clean grime off your dishes.
Only suggestions to a great stay would be plastic cups, plates and bowls X 2 for those will young kids, but that's being picky. Oh and I forgot to bring shower soap so maybe a small bar of that included.
Perfect location with a great bike, walking or scooter path across the road, kids park maybe 7min walk, fish and chips a short walk and a courtesy bus to the country club for amazing Chinese! Everyone we met locally in Tin Can Bay was lovely and helpful, even the local guy at the service station was happy to share fishing knowledge. Dolphins are a must do and see!
Already looking at potential dates to come back!
Thanks again to the Kingfisher team!
Very friendly..pets allowed
Parked up in our van, easy sites to get on, tidy and clean amenities, user friendly camp kitchen. Would recommend
Caravan site grass was long this place needs TLC urgently gardens are run down uneven surface etc

Don't understand how it got a 4+ star rating. Very ordinary, lawns & edges not looked after, gardens & plants in bad state. Could be improved immensely with some TLC. Some permanent vans spoil the place as well they are run down & some are unsightly. Won't be back there again.
Nice and quite place

We stayed in a cabin for one night and so glad we weren't staying longer. The cabin was run down and dirty. I just dont understand why maintenance is not carried out.Very small so wouldn't recommend to families. Looking on to the main road which was very noisy. The shower was a trickle and not hot. The bed was uncomfortable.
Wont be returning

Had a great stay here last week good sites for motorhome or caravans clean amenities and friendly staff
The park is central to everything you need around town
Great place to explore with a bike
Happy Motorhomers
Nice clean amenities, great location close to dolphin feeding, close to fishing 🎣, friendly staff, reasonably priced van sites easy to navigate.

Not a bad little park, but be aware in wet weather there are some caravan/tent sites that may be a little damp. Staff are friendly and helpful close to most things in the area. We stayed in our caravan, not the cabins. The cabins look out at the water but I can't comment on what they are like inside.
It's old but very clean and functional

Beautiful spot and friendly staff. Walking distance to restaurants, very lovely view and so close to the beach. Cabin had everything you need and was very clean and comfortable. I often come to Tin Can Bay and have stayed elsewhere, this is my new favourite spot and where I intend to book in future. Thanks again!

Air con  and blankets smelt of smoke and being non smokers it was very noticeable  obviously blankets werent washed between stays bed uncomfortable  slept on single mattress on floor  springs were felt water view with sunrise was nice only good  thing about our stay. To far to walk to shop for  milk and stuff.
Comfortable units, walking distance to most things

Amenities were clean, staff very helpful. Sites needed a bit of a mow as we were on grassed site, grass was a bit long, travelling with a baby who was learning to crawl etc, it meant we had to put blankets down as the grass was too long for her to sit and play on. There was a bit of a mosquito / sandfly problem (clearly not the parks fault, just an observation). Rain on the last morning meant we were packing up in the wet, and our mat that we’d placed on the awning side, was floating in mud. Perhaps some levelling of the sites would have been helpful, or concrete slab for all caravan sites.
A very special place where to stop! The owner is very helpful and he will give you lots of local tips! Highly recommended!
Excellent as usual

Cabin pretty ordinary. Screen door off its runners and grooves dirty. Lock difficult to use.|We requested a receipt on two occasions as the eftpos printout jammed, but we still have not received it. Not impressed.
Fish Co Op great, bike paths excellent,  coffee and food all good, very relaxing
Friendly and great location.
Nice little caravan park, clean modern facilities and Glenn the manager is super helpful and knowledgeable
Very quiet park, clean amenities.
Great spot, close to Marina and dolphin feeding. Good facilities
Decent sized sites and very helpful staff. Lovely bathroom amenities.
Clean & neat,  facilities very clean,  dog friendly,  close to cafes, etc.  Beautiful area.

Lovely quaint caravan park with modern facilities. Host is very friendly and close walk to marina, dolphin feeding, bar/cafes and IGA. Area is nice and quiet. Would recommend the stay here over highly populated tourist areas if you seeking somewhere to relax.
Great park for oldies, no pool or playground but across the road from nice safe waterway

Tin Can Bay is a lovely place.
Staff at caravan Park very friendly .
Amenities were very clean.
The caravan Park itself is very squashy.

Stayed on a powered site.
Facilities are fantastic, it's an open caravan park with great personality close to plenty of attractions and shops.
Lovely caravan park. Good location and friendly staff.
Clean facilities,  quiet, friendly staffs and it is located in a very good spot 👌
All I asked for. Will be back.

Best park ! Great site location excellent we had right next to amenities . Permanent residences gave us a giggle discussing all us visiting they are a great old bunch though
Very close to shops walking tracks dolphin feeding etc
Glenn is an excellent manager he is a brilliantly accommodating person
Great stay . Nice little cabins. Glen a great bloke.
Caravan park beautifully looked after. Toilets clean and fairly modern. Lovely spot to stay.

This park is located between the marina and the bay. It is pet friendly with a lovely reserve across the road with lovely walkways either direction. Ammenities were clean the only downside is the small caravan sites. It was full when we were there so felt very hemmed in.

Accommodation was in a fantastic location although the town is very quiet. Booking was easy and staff were polite. The view from our cabin was beautiful and the cabin itself was clean, neat and well appointed. The only downfall was the terrible (think non existent) water pressure in the shower.
We enjoyed our short stay and found locals to be friendly and helpful. Just don't expect anything yo be open after 7.30pm 😉
Perfect spot across from beach. Only minutes to anywhere in town. Great staff!
